        "Today is Tuesday (2026-03-24), so DAYS=2 per the rules.",
        "I need to run the GChat reader script with --days 2 pointing to Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.",

    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",

        "session": 0,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat_reader.py --days 2 && echo \"SCRIPT_FINISHED\" || echo \"SCRIPT_FAILED:$?\""
    }
}

thoughts: Today is Tuesday (2026-03-24), so DAYS=2 per the rules.
I need to run the GChat reader script with --days 2 pointing to Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.
The script may take 5-15 minutes, so I'll start it and set up monitoring by tailing the debug log every 30s (up to 10 times).
On completion or failure, I must send a notify-user notification with Python at /a0/usr/skills/notify-user/scripts/notify.py.
I'll use code_execution_tool to run the script in terminal runtime and wait for output.
